tool_args.label: List of Competitive Procurements for Board Approval - April 2025

payload.title: List of Competitive Procurements for Board Approval
payload.description: MTA Board procurement document listing modifications to personal/miscellaneous service contracts requiring board approval, including Management Consultant Services extension, Cubic OVD enhancements, and Ernst & Young GRC system extension.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: MTA contactless fare payment system

tool_args.label: Management Consultant Services Multi-Agency Contracts Extension
tool_args.raw_text: Board approval is requested to: (1) extend 15 competitively negotiated all-agency personal service contracts for the provision of Management Consultant Services...for 12 months (May 31, 2025–May 31, 2026); and (2) increase the aggregate amount of these contracts by an amount not-to-exceed $10.3 million.

payload.project_name: Management Consultant Services Multi-Agency Contracts Extension
payload.description: Extension of 15 competitively negotiated all-agency personal service contracts for Management Consultant Services for 12 months and increase of aggregate amount by $10.3 million to allow time to solicit and award new multiagency management consulting contracts through a competitive RFP.

tool_args.label: Onboard Validation Device Enhancements
tool_args.raw_text: MTAHQ requests Board approval for a modification in the amount of $3.95 million to enhance and expand the use of Onboard Validation Devices ("OVDs") and for technical support for the OVDs through July 31, 2030. The modification also includes two 5-year options for continued technical support...The total amount sought for this modification, including both options, is $4,908,838.

payload.description: Modification to Contract A-34024 with Cubic Transportation Systems to enhance and expand the use of OVDs from Select Bus Service routes to regular bus service routes, including software enhancements and updated hardware, plus technical support through July 2030.

tool_args.label: MTA Governance, Risk, and Compliance System Extension
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Headquarters is seeking Board approval to extend a competitively negotiated miscellaneous procurement contract awarded to Ernst & Young LLC ("EY") for MTA Governance, Risk, and Compliance ("GRC") System for an additional five years to provide continuous software as a service ("SaaS") and technical support of MTA's GRC System in the amount of $8,940,623.

payload.project_name: MTA Governance, Risk, and Compliance System Extension
payload.description: Five-year extension of contract with Ernst & Young LLC for MTA GRC System SaaS and technical support, including additional applications, vendor portal access, training passes, and ServiceNow integration at no cost.

tool_args.label: Onboard Validation Device Pilot on SBS Routes
tool_args.raw_text: The Contract included a pilot program to test the use of OVDs on Select Bus Service routes as an enforcement tool in fare collection. The OVDs are mounted on mobile phones that MTA personnel on buses use to scan the fare payment medium...The pilot, which began in 2020, has proven successful in maintaining fare compliance and mitigating revenue losses due to fare evasion.

payload.description: Pilot program using OVDs mounted on mobile phones for fare validation on Select Bus Service routes, enabling MTA personnel to scan fare payment media and issue warnings or summons for unpaid fares

tool_args.label: OVD Enhancements: Software and Hardware Updates
tool_args.raw_text: Based on lessons learned from the pilot, NYC Transit and MTABC requested certain enhancements to the OVDs to improve the fare validation function consisting of (1) software enhancements to improve download lag times and reduce the number of incomplete scans; and (2) updated hardware to address obsolescence issues and bring the devices up to current MTA security standards.

payload.description: Software enhancements to improve download lag times and reduce incomplete scans; updated hardware to address obsolescence and meet current MTA security standards

tool_args.label: OVD Expansion to Regular Bus Service Routes
tool_args.raw_text: NYC Transit and MTABC also requested 405 additional OVDs to expand the OVD program from Select Bus Service routes to regular bus service routes.

payload.description: Expansion of OVD program from Select Bus Service routes to regular bus service routes with 405 additional devices

tool_args.label: Management Consultant Services - Contract Increase
tool_args.raw_text: increase the aggregate amount of these contracts by an amount not-to-exceed $10.3 million

tool_args.label: GRC System - EY No-Cost Technology Services Value
tool_args.raw_text: EY will provide technology services at no cost (a $3.1 million savings to the MTA)

payload.description: Technology services provided at no cost by EY including adding up to 12 applications, vendor portal access for 25 vendors, Archer Summit passes, and ServiceNow integration support

tool_args.label: OVD Pilot Successful in Fare Compliance

payload.claim_text: The pilot, which began in 2020, has proven successful in maintaining fare compliance and mitigating revenue losses due to fare evasion.

tool_args.label: 15 Projects Awarded Through Management Consulting Services

payload.claim_text: To date, 15 projects have been awarded through the Management Consulting Services contracts for a total of $24.8 million. All services performed have been deemed satisfactory and provided value to the MTA.

tool_args.label: GRC Platform Vendor Switch Deemed Very High Risk

payload.claim_text: There has been a significant amount of capital invested over the years in the GRC platform and the EY support team...the feasibility of seeking a new platform or support service vendor at this time is a very high risk and impact for the MTA to undertake.
